violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety registered with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided state guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan guards in the production walk-in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
The walk-in freezer has an accumulation of ice near the door. Staff cleared ice during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
